en.presentation: Hi! I'm Agustin, a web developer.

projects.title: Pokédex
projects.description: A pokédex made consuming the pokeapi v2. Learned a lot of css tricks and about api calls with JS.

projects.title: Chedoc Shows
projects.description: A web page showing movies and series for an interview at chedoc. Made using React Router and Zustand along with the classic web trio.
